name: Nager.Date Public Holidays API
description:
The Nager.Date API is a free public service that provides reliable information about public holidays and long weekends for countries around the world. It allows developers to query national holiday dates (including St. Patrick's Day for Ireland), check whether a specific day is a public holiday, list upcoming holidays, and explore long-weekend data.

By using the API, you agree to the Terms of Service at https://date.nager.at/Legal/TermsOfService
